response:
Alex reads books.
Books hold stories.
Stories show love.
Love defies norms.
Norms shift slowly.
Slowly changes minds.
Minds open wide.
Wide paths appear.
Paths lead far.
Far journeys start.
Starts bring hope.
Hope fuels dreams.
Dreams inspire action.
Action creates change.
Change alters views.
Views broaden scope.
Scope expands daily.
Daily effort counts.
Counts matter most.
Most readers learn.
Learn new things.
Things surprise often.
Often shocks occur.
Occur within pages.
Pages fill time.
Time flies fast.
Fast reading helps.
Helps build skills.
Skills grow strong.
Strong minds think.
Think deeply now.
Now we know.
Know the sum.
Sum equals ten.
Ten pages daily.
Daily reading wins.
Wins bring joy.
Joy fills hearts.
Hearts beat faster.
Faster growth comes.
Comes from books.
